stat_cards.name: stat_cards
stat_cards.description: Grid of KPI stat cards each with a label, large value, and optional trend delta — use for dashboards and metric overviews.

architecture_diagram.name: architecture_diagram
architecture_diagram.description: A layered software architecture diagram with color-coded boxes, directional arrows between layers, and a legend — use for visualizing system components and data flow.
architecture_diagram.reasoning: Architecture diagrams are one of the most common visualization requests in engineering contexts. The pattern — named layers, typed boxes with titles/bullets/file paths, arrows with labels, and a color legend — is stable and reusable across any codebase or system design.

deployment_timeline.name: deployment_timeline
deployment_timeline.description: Vertical timeline of deployment events, each with a status-colored dot, title, timestamp, description, and badge — use for CI/CD history, release logs, or any ordered event feed.

events.title: Build #1042 queued
events.description: triggered by push to main · jacksons107

deployment_timeline.reasoning: Deployment timelines appear constantly in DevOps, CI/CD, and observability contexts. The status-colored dot + card pattern is stable and reusable across any event log where items have a status, timestamp, and short description.
